overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a suit and fedora exploring a dimly lit, vintage wood-paneled hotel or mansion. The character walks through narrow corridors, peers into rooms, ascends a grand staircase, and explores lounge areas with atmospheric warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled hotel corridor with wall sconces

events.description: approaching room 104 doorway and peering inside the dimly lit interior
character stops briefly to look into room 104 before door closes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor, pausing to glance into room 104

entered.detail: dark mahogany wood paneling with decorative trim covering corridor walls
ornate brass wall-mounted lamps emitting warm amber light
dark wooden door with room number 104 plaque that opens to reveal bedroom interior
wooden bench with striped upholstery against the left wall
polished wood floor arranged in herringbone pattern with red carpet runner

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit hotel corridor with dark wood paneling and warm wall sconces. Approaching room 104, the door opens to reveal a bedroom interior with red lighting, which the character observes briefly before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with serving carts and ceiling fans

events.description: corridor opens into larger space with visible ceiling fan and grand archway ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the hallway, passing a metal serving cart and moving toward a more open area

entered.detail: metal rolling cart with trays and linens parked against the wall
dark wooden ceiling fan with multiple blades mounted on ornate ceiling
large decorative archway with lattice woodwork leading to main hall

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the corridor, passing a serving cart and moving under ceiling fans. The hallway gradually opens up as the character approaches a grand archway with decorative lattice work, transitioning toward a larger space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hotel lobby with double staircase and marble floors

events.description: character begins ascending the grand central staircase with wooden railings
encountering an NPC in a tan suit standing on the upper landing

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase, passing an NPC in a tan suit on the upper landing

notable_agents.action: man in tan suit and hat standing on upper landing, observing the character

entered.detail: wide bifurcated staircase with dark wood railings and marble steps
upper floor landing with marble flooring and wood panel walls
large potted palm plant in white planter on upper landing
sofa covered with white sheet on the upper floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand lobby with a magnificent bifurcated staircase and marble floors. Ascending the stairs, the character passes an NPC in a tan suit standing on the upper landing. The upper floor features wood-paneled walls, potted plants, and furniture covered in white sheets.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge area with covered furniture and scattered debris

events.description: character descends secondary staircase into lower lounge area
passing a woman seated in a lounge chair in the open room

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and exploring the lounge area, passing a seated woman and examining the space

notable_agents.action: woman in dress sitting in red lounge chair, facing away from the character

entered.detail: upholstered armchairs and sofas arranged in the lounge area
wooden crates stacked in the middle of the room
framed artwork hanging on the wood-paneled walls
multi-bulb ceiling light fixture with glowing orbs

segments.scene_description: The character descends a secondary staircase into a spacious lounge with red carpeting and scattered debris. The room contains covered furniture, stacked wooden crates, and a woman seated in a lounge chair. The character explores the area, passing under chandeliers and framed wall art.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, wood-paneled hotel corridor that gradually expands into a grand, sprawling interior. It begins with the character navigating a narrow hallway lit by warm sconces, pausing briefly as a door opens to reveal a bedroom bathed in red light. As the character moves deeper past a serving cart and rotating ceiling fans, the corridor opens through a decorative lattice archway into a magnificent lobby featuring marble floors and a bifurcated staircase. The camera then ascends to an upper landing past a man in a tan suit and furniture draped in white sheets, before descending a secondary staircase into a spacious lounge. The scene finally settles in this wide area of red carpeting and scattered debris, moving under chandeliers and past a seated woman among stacked wooden crates.
